positive: A stylized, minimalist design of interconnected celestial bodies and constellations, rendered in a vibrant deep navy and electric gold color palette. The central element features an abstract depiction of a crescent moon embraced by sweeping lines of stylized cosmic dust and eight major constellation outlines (such as Orion, Ursa Major, and Lyra). The style should be neo-geometric line art combined with modern abstract tattoo flash aesthetics. The composition must be symmetrical and highly centered, designed as a repeatable, clean print. Use strong, defined silhouettes and crisp lines suitable for a high-contrast textile print. Background should be solid deep midnight blue, maximizing the contrast of the glowing gold lines.
negative: blurry, deformed, noise, low quality, text, signature, watermark, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, solid fill background, photorealistic
